page.content: In the AbbVie pharmaceutical pipeline as of March 2025, the first table details two drugs: ABBV-181, which is in Phase 3, with a status of Positive, an estimated cost of CHF 200M, projected launch in 2026, and CHF 250M allocated for clinical trials; and ABBV-202, currently in Phase 2, with an ongoing status, estimated cost of CHF 150M, projected launch also in 2026, and CHF 250M for clinical trials.

page.content: The second table outlines the approval timeline for five drugs: DrugA, which is in Phase 1, has a clinical trial cost of 15M, completed in Q1 2025, with regulatory submission in 2023, approval in 2024, market launch in 2025, and projected revenue of CHF 50M; DrugB is ongoing, with an approval timeline starting in Q2 2025 at a cost of 20M; DrugC is delayed, with a clinical trial cost of 10M, regulatory submission in 2023, approval in 2024, market launch in 2025, and revenue of 30M; DrugD, completed, has a clinical trial cost of 25M, regulatory submission in 2023, approval in 2024, market launch in 2025, and revenue of CHF 40M; and DrugE is ongoing with a cost of 18M, regulatory submission in 2023, approval in 2024, market launch in 2025, and revenue of 28M.
